programme.title: Soul of the Ocean
programme.desc: Howard Hall, who specializes in underwater films, will use spectacular shots of the sea depths to present the complex ecosystems in the oceans.It will show the interdependencies between species of aquatic creatures.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Season 5
programme.desc: At the Critter Fixer clinic, doctors are fighting for the life of a critically ill dog and treating another animal that requires a complicated procedure to remove a record number of kidney stones.In the meantime, an injured wild turtle is given a chance to survive.Veterinarians also cannot ignore their regular patient, Bear the cat, who also needs help.The team also has to take care of a Belgian giant, a colorful conure parrot, a hen that can't lay an egg, and a pair of adorable kittens.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: The creators of the documentary go to the Philippines.It is a country inhabited by over 100 million people and has over 7,600 islands, only a small part of which is inhabited.In the waters of the Pacific Ocean you can find coral reefs full of life.They are an ideal shelter for various animal species.An unprecedented wealth of fauna and flora can be found in the local equatorial forests.They also include numerous endemic species.In this delightful world, each island of the archipelago is different and hides phenomenal secrets.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Dr. K detects intestinal problems in the miniature rabbit Pixel and orders a CT scan.Webster, a 29-year-old common macaw, has vision problems.The parrot's eye needs to be removed.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed Life on Earth exists thanks to the atmosphere, which appears to people in space as a thin blue layer.An extraordinary chain of relationships leads to the production of oxygen, the most abundant element on the planet.Disrupting the delicate balance can leave living creatures unable to breathe.The creators of the series will talk about surprising phenomena - a sandstorm covering almost the entire world, the Amazon and its sky rivers, the power hidden by glaciers and single-celled algae - diatoms.

programme.title: Snake City: Snakes in the City Beyond the Venom Compilation Season 7
programme.desc: There are over 25 species of snakes in Durban and Simon, Sioux and Mbali have to deal with many of them.

programme.title: Alaska's Grizzly Gauntlet
programme.desc: Prince William Sound is home to black bears.Three thousand individuals live there, and over 100,000 in the entire territory of Alaska.Survivalist Les Stroud will take a closer look at them, and what's more, he will come face to face with them.However, before he decides to meet, he must learn more about the habits of the subjects of his research.He will be helped by someone who knows everything about the local flora and fauna.Stroud's guide spent decades observing black bears.Thanks to it, the traveler will learn what dangers he may encounter after crossing the borders of the kingdom of these predators.The expedition begins when they are preparing for the arrival of winter.They need to increase their weight because the additional protective layer is useful in hostile weather conditions.Bears are looking for food, but if they choose the wrong place, they are in serious danger.First of all, they must be vigilant - every rustle means that an unwanted companion has appeared.Viewers will see how predators deal with them.It is also worth mentioning that these animals want to be left in peace wherever they are.This is why Stroud does not enter their lairs, because a confrontation may prove painful.

programme.title: Ocean with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Renowned British naturalist Sir David Attenborough recently celebrated his 99th birthday.For several decades, he has been popularizing knowledge about the Blue Planet and drawing attention to the need to protect disappearing worlds.Oceans have a special place in his mission.In the document, which is a visual feast, it presents unusual forms of life hidden in the depths inaccessible to humans.Using new filming technologies, it takes viewers to amazing places.Warns against the threats related to climate change.It also shows how fishing devastates aquatic ecosystems.However, his message is not without hope.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr Pol 5
programme.desc: Another season of hard work by Dr. Jan Pol and his colleagues.The team will need a new member because Dr. Emily is expecting a baby and someone will have to replace her.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 6
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team help animals in need.In the new series, the veterinary clinic staff will face many challenges, such as creating a hoof prosthesis or helping stressed cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: The creators of the documentary go to the Philippines.It is a country inhabited by over 100 million people and has over 7,600 islands, only a small part of which is inhabited.In the waters of the Pacific Ocean you can find coral reefs full of life.They are an ideal shelter for various animal species.An unprecedented wealth of fauna and flora can be found in the local equatorial forests.They also include numerous endemic species.In this delightful world, each island of the archipelago is different and hides phenomenal secrets.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Dr. K detects intestinal problems in the miniature rabbit Pixel and orders a CT scan.Webster, a 29-year-old common macaw, has vision problems.The parrot's eye needs to be removed.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed Life on Earth exists thanks to the atmosphere, which appears to people in space as a thin blue layer.An extraordinary chain of relationships leads to the production of oxygen, the most abundant element on the planet.Disrupting the delicate balance can leave living creatures unable to breathe.The creators of the series will talk about surprising phenomena - a sandstorm covering almost the entire world, the Amazon and its sky rivers, the power hidden by glaciers and single-celled algae - diatoms.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: The creators of the documentary go to the Philippines.It is a country inhabited by over 100 million people and has over 7,600 islands, only a small part of which is inhabited.In the waters of the Pacific Ocean you can find coral reefs full of life.They are an ideal shelter for various animal species.An unprecedented wealth of fauna and flora can be found in the local equatorial forests.They also include numerous endemic species.In this delightful world, each island of the archipelago is different and hides phenomenal secrets.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER 4
programme.sub-title: Two heads are better than one

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Snakes in the City: Uncharted Compilation 6
Land of 10,000 Grizzlies
programme.desc: In the far east of Russia there is a peninsula covered with volcanoes and geysers.It is home to the largest population of grizzly bears in the world.

programme.title: Madagascar's Weirdest
programme.desc: Humid lowland forests are the most beautiful region of Madagascar.They provide ideal living conditions for many fascinating creatures.Among them are ring-tailed lemurs - real stars that live only here on the island.Contrary to popular belief, they are led by a queen, not a king.While traversing dense forests, we will come across masters of camouflage, such as Dumeril's boa or leopard chameleon, quickly regenerating geckos, capricious and hellishly dangerous fossas, and dugongs, which are amusing giants.

programme.title: Europe's New Wild
programme.desc: There is no shortage of impressive metropolises and monuments of civilization on the European continent.Regions free from human interference are particularly valuable here.Past generations have witnessed the extinction of some animal species.The six-episode documentary series contains an optimistic message that nature can regenerate.The filmmakers showed the activities of scientists who are trying to rebuild fragile ecosystems in places such as the Carpathians, Lapland and the Danube Delta.In this episode they will also visit Poland.The return of the wolf, bison and lynx Viewers will learn about the effects of the program to restore the bison population in the Romanian mountains.This species plays an important role in shaping the landscape and influences the lives of other animals.The cameras captured an exciting confrontation between a herd of these majestic deer and wolves.To learn about the situation of dog ancestors, who often fell victim to humans, the documentarians went to Poland.One of the heroes of the episode is a persistent bassist.Released in the Kampinos National Park, the wolf traveled a long way alone - only in the mountains did it find a home.The filmmakers also showed the story of Slovak lynxes, which were used to rebuild the population of this species in Germany.

programme.title: Primate Planet
programme.desc: The creators will introduce the world of primates, taking viewers from the crowns of tropical trees to snow-capped peaks.They will show the extraordinary behaviors of these animals, their strong family bonds and unique personalities.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Effect
programme.desc: Hummingbirds, tiny birds, play an important role in Costa Rica, which is one of the richest and wildest ecosystems on Earth.This realm of biodiversity, from volcanic peaks to the coastal jungle, is home to over fifty species of these creatures.Among them, viewers will see, among others:vocally, long-beaked hermit crabs, temperamental silver squirrels and indomitable amethysts are magnificent.Volcanic hummingbirds are found only in the Talamanca Mountains.Hummingbirds are the only birds in the world that, thanks to their structure, can fly backwards.They are specialized for collecting nectar from flowers.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.
